Approval workflow: ApprovalRequest is keyed per SmsGroupId (GetApprovalRequestBySmsGroupId). Only one request per group.
Email2SmsWhitelist: controls which email addresses are allowed to trigger SMS via email gateway — per-customer whitelist.
GetUnApprovedRequests(profileId) returns all; GetUnApprovedRequests(profileId, userId) filters by assignee.
RunSmsGroupStatisticsAsync whatIf=true: dry run, no persistence — used for admin preview.
ScheduleBroadcastsFromFileAsync: strategy is a named string, not an enum — resolved by DI/strategy pattern.
SmsGroupDeletedNotification is MediatR INotification — handled async by SmsGroupDeletedHandler.
SmsGroupSchedule supports exceptions: individual date overrides on a recurring schedule.
if truly empty (use empty list, not null).
must be plain English or well-known identifiers.
